meaning: n.小孩,(活泼的)少女,芽vt.摘去芽
examples: Schrader initialed the chit for the barman.
Go up to them and chit chat for a few minutes.
Ll: So, did you tell her you didn't have time to chit chat?
The e-mails, in English and Arabic, contain "both evidence and chit chat, " the source said.
Theyd get a chit for future payments -- only if the Thai oilfield met certain goals.
